extraSources.name: Study in NL — Visa & residence permit

requirements.label: Admission from a recognised sponsor
requirements.detail: Acceptance from a Dutch institution that is a recognised sponsor with the IND (it applies for your permit).

requirements.label: Proof of sufficient financial means
requirements.detail: Show the IND minimum (about €13,600 for the year, ~€1,133/month) to cover living costs, excluding tuition.

requirements.label: MVV entry visa (nationality-dependent)
requirements.detail: Non-EU nationals usually need an MVV (entry visa) arranged together with the residence permit (TEV procedure).

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Arrange insurance valid in the Netherlands for your stay.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL as your programme requires for English-taught study.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for your intended stay.

requirements.label: Tuberculosis (TB) test
requirements.detail: Some nationalities must take a TB test after arrival.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition or proof-of-funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Dutch number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Dutch student housing is very scarce — arrange it as early as possible.
